schedule.description: Game recap — Pirates 2, Cubs 1, 9th straight loss
Jordan Wicks preview — debut ballpark callback, Iowa stats, matchup
NL Central standings — Cubs 3rd, Cardinals-Brewers tonight
Paul Skenes looming Thursday — offense urgency
Kevin Alcantara MLB arrival — first days, power profile
Wicks pre-game hype — PNC Park debut backstory

stories.title: Pirates 2, Cubs 1 — Nine Straight Losses, Brown's Gem Wasted
stories.angle: Score-led recap; Busch 6th HR ties it in 5th; Trent Thornton gives up Henry Davis walk-off HR in 7th; Cubs stranded 5 early; 9th straight loss; 29-25

x_posts.label: Post 1A
x_posts.text:
Pirates 2, Cubs 1. Nine straight.

Busch tied it 1-1 with his 6th HR in the 5th. Thornton then gave up Henry Davis's go-ahead shot in the 7th, and that was it. Cubs stranded 5 runners early — another Ben Brown gem, wasted.

29-25. Losers of 13 of 15.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Jordan Wicks Returns to Where It All Began — First MLB Start of 2026
stories.angle: Wicks starts at PNC Park where he made MLB debut Aug 2023 (9 K, 10-6 win); Iowa 0.60 ERA in last 3 starts; faces Ashcraft (2.89 ERA); 5:40 PM CT

x_posts.label: Post 2A
x_posts.text:
Jordan Wicks makes his first MLB start of 2026 tonight — at PNC Park, where he made his debut in Aug 2023 (9 K, 10-6 win).

Wicks: 0.60 ERA in his last 3 Iowa starts. He faces Braxton Ashcraft (2.89 ERA). First pitch 5:40 PM CT.

New arm. Same place.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
x_posts.tweet_type: Informative / Game Preview + Pre-Game Hype (2 posts)

x_posts.label: Post 2B
x_posts.text:
Jordan Wicks made his MLB debut at PNC Park — struck out 9 in a 10-6 Cubs win on Aug 26, 2023.

Tonight he returns with the Cubs on a 9-game losing streak and a rotation that needs him badly. First pitch 5:40 PM CT.

Same ballpark. Fresh chapter.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
x_posts.tweet_type: Informative / Game Preview + Pre-Game Hype (2 posts)

stories.title: NL Central Watch — Cardinals at Brewers Tonight
stories.angle: Cubs 29-25, third in NL Central; dropped from 1st to 3rd in 17 days; Cardinals at Brewers head-to-head tonight; Cubs have no say

x_posts.label: Post 3A
x_posts.text:
Cubs are 29-25. Third in the NL Central.

They've dropped from first place to third in 17 days. Tonight: Cardinals at Brewers in a head-to-head showdown Chicago has no say in. If you want to root for something, root for rain in Milwaukee.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

research.facts:
NL Central Watch — Cardinals at Brewers Tonight
**Decision:** FOLLOW UP (ongoing division standings series)
**Sources:**
- May 25 pipeline confirmed standings: Brewers 30-20, Cardinals 29-22, Cubs 29-24
- Series context JSON: Cubs 29-25 (current, post-Monday loss)
- ESPN: "Cardinals vs. Brewers (May 26, 2026) Live Score" — confirms tonight's game

**Key verified facts:**
- Cubs record: 29-25 — HIGH (series context JSON)
- Cubs in third place in NL Central — HIGH (from May 25 standings: Brewers 30-20, Cardinals 29-22, Cubs now 29-25)
- Cardinals at Brewers tonight (May 26) — HIGH (confirmed by ESPN and FOX Sports game listings)

- Brewers record: 30-20 at minimum (may have changed after May 25 games; using last confirmed data)

**Why this story matters:** Cubs fans want to know where they stand. The Cardinals-Brewers head-to-head is directly relevant — if Cardinals beat Brewers tonight, Cubs gain a notch of division help.

stories.title: Paul Skenes Looms Thursday — Cubs Have 2 Games to Find an Offense
stories.angle: Skenes (6-4, 3.00 ERA, 65 K) pitches Game 4 Thu May 28; Cubs scored 1 run in Game 1; offense urgency framing; nightmare matchup

x_posts.label: Post 4A
x_posts.text:
The Cubs face Paul Skenes on Thursday. Let that sink in.

Skenes: 6-4, 3.00 ERA, 65 strikeouts. Chicago scored just 1 run in Game 1 and has averaged under 3 runs per game during this 9-game skid. This isn't a scheduling quirk — it's a nightmare matchup.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Kevin Alcantara Is Here — MLB Arrival, Early Adjustments Ahead
stories.angle: Called up May 23 (Nicky Lopez DFA); 15 HRs/.567 SLG at Iowa; first MLB at-bat 0-for-1 K; corrects May 25 pipeline error that still treated him as Iowa prospect

x_posts.label: Post 5A
x_posts.text:
Kevin Alcantara is officially a Cub.

Called up May 23, he had 15 HRs and a .567 slugging in 41 Iowa games. First MLB at-bat: 0-for-1 with a strikeout. That's fine — just give him time. The Cubs desperately need what his bat can do.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubsBaseball
